## Scope note

SwarmOtter controls official SwarmOtter repositories, documentation, examples,
issue templates, discussions, release artifacts, and project-hosted assets. It
does not control third-party use of the software.

SwarmOtter does not include, endorse, host, index, or provide access to
copyrighted material distributed without authorization. See
`design/lawful-use.md`, `design/content-policy.md`, and `design/legal.md`.

This form is project policy tooling, not a substitute for legal counsel.
